body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55746", "cvss": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Cotonti 1.0.0 (master branch, commit f43f1fc3) is vulnerable to stored Cross-Site Scripting in the Personal File Storage (PFS) module. A folder title (pff_title) is imported with the 'TXT' filter, which does not strip or encode HTML (the tag check in cot_import is disabled), so an authenticated user can store HTML/JavaScript in a folder title. In modules/pfs/inc/pfs.main.php the title is assigned to the template variable PFF_ROW_TITLE without htmlspecialchars(), and modules/pfs/tpl/pfs.tpl outputs {PFF_ROW_TITLE} unescaped. When the folder listing is viewed (including by other users for public folders), the injected script executes in the victim's browser.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00171, "percentile": 0.06726}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-86hp-hf3j-3m8r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T14:52:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86hp-hf3j-3m8r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-86hp-hf3j-3m8r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55746"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T08:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T12:40:26Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55746", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti/blob/f43f1fc38ba4e02027786dad9dac1435c7c52b30/modules/pfs/inc/pfs.main.php#L396", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86hp-hf3j-3m8r"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "summary": "Cotonti: Stored Cross-Site Scripting in the Personal File Storage (PFS) module", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T14:52:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-86hp-hf3j-3m8r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "cotonti/cotonti"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
